query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN ocrConfidence IS NULL THEN 'NULL'
    WHEN ocrConfidence >= 95 THEN '95-100%'
    WHEN ocrConfidence >= 90 THEN '90-94%'
    WHEN ocrConfidence >= 85 THEN '85-89%'
    WHEN ocrConfidence >= 80 THEN '80-84%'
    WHEN ocrConfidence >= 70 THEN '70-79%'
    WHEN ocrConfidence >= 50 THEN '50-69%'
    ELSE '0-49%'
  END as confidence_range,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM line_receipts
WHERE status = 'rejected'
GROUP BY confidence_range
ORDER BY confidence_range DESC

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN ocrConfidence IS NULL THEN 'NULL'
    WHEN ocrConfidence >= 95 THEN '95-100%'
    WHEN ocrConfidence >= 90 THEN '90-94%'
    WHEN ocrConfidence >= 85 THEN '85-89%'
    WHEN ocrConfidence >= 80 THEN '80-84%'
    WHEN ocrConfidence >= 70 THEN '70-79%'
    WHEN ocrConfidence >= 50 THEN '50-69%'
    ELSE '0-49%'
  END as confidence_range,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM line_receipts
WHERE status = 'rejected'
GROUP BY confidence_range
ORDER BY confidence_range DESC
